results.title: Agentation
results.description: Agentation is a client-side React component that runs in the browser to generate structured feedback and annotations from DOM content, keeping all data local for development-only use.

results.title: AI Agent Service Toolkit
results.description: A comprehensive toolkit and template for building and running AI agent services using LangGraph, FastAPI, and Streamlit, providing a complete setup from agent definition to a chat-based user interface.

results.title: Agent Browser
results.description: Agentic Browser is a powerful browser assistant with embedded AI capabilities, combining React, Tauri, and Node.js to answer questions about web pages and interact with content.

results.title: Reactive Agents
results.description: Reactive Agents is an elegant AI agent framework for building intelligent, autonomous agents with multiple reasoning strategies, comprehensive tool integration, and production-ready architecture.

results.title: Arcaelas Agent
results.description: An advanced TypeScript AI agent library with multi-provider support, reactive contexts, and intelligent tool orchestration for building enterprise-grade conversational AI applications.

results.title: AI Workbench Agentic RAG Example
results.description: Agentic RAG enhances Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) with an agentic layer for routing, evaluation, and iteration, allowing for web search integration and hallucination control.

results.title: Agent Development Kit
results.description: The Agent Development Kit (ADK) is a flexible framework for building and deploying AI agents, optimized for Gemini and the Google ecosystem, designed to streamline agent development with features like flexible orchestration, multi-agent architecture, and a rich tool ecosystem.

results.title: AgentFlow
results.description: AgentFlow is a trainable, tool-integrated agentic framework with a modular system (Planner, Executor, Verifier, Generator) that optimizes the planner agent using Flow-GRPO for effective planning and tool use in long-horizon reasoning tasks.

results.title: AgentPrism
results.description: AgentPrism provides React components for visualizing traces from AI agents, displaying LLM calls, tool executions, and agent workflows in a hierarchical timeline.

results.title: Agent Development Kit (ADK) Python API Reference
results.description: The Agent Development Kit (ADK) is a framework that provides tools, APIs, and components for building, evaluating, and managing AI agents, including features for agent definition, memory, planning, and external tool integration.

results.title: Agentok Studio
results.description: Agentok Studio is a visual tool for building agentic applications with drag-and-drop simplicity, streamlining the creation and management of complex agent-based workflows built upon the AG2 framework.

results.title: AgentMap
results.description: AgentMap is a declarative orchestration framework that transforms CSV files into LangGraph AI agent workflows, enabling the creation of multi-agent systems, conversational interfaces, and document processing pipelines with minimal code.

results.title: Agent Browser
results.description: A headless browser automation CLI for AI agents with fast Rust implementation and Node.js fallback, featuring semantic locators and accessibility tree snapshots.

results.title: Agent Context Kit
results.description: Agent Context Kit is a toolkit for managing and passing context information in Bitrix agent-based applications.

results.title: Agentic RAG Service
results.description: This project demonstrates building a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) service using .NET 8, Azure OpenAI, and Semantic Kernel, featuring both traditional and agentic RAG implementations with modular architecture and plugin support.

results.title: Cognipeer Agent SDK
results.description: A lightweight, message-first agent runtime that provides transparent tool calls, automatic history summarization, planning, multi-agent handoffs, and structured tracing.

results.title: Agent Toolkit
results.description: The Knock Agent Toolkit enables popular agent frameworks like OpenAI and Vercel's AI SDK to integrate with Knock's APIs, allowing developers to build agent systems for cross-channel notifications and manage Knock integrations.

results.title: Agent Developmnet Kit (ADK) Python
results.description: An open-source, code-first Python toolkit for building, evaluating, and deploying sophisticated AI agents with flexibility and control, designed to make agent development feel more like software development.

results.title: Browser-Agent
results.description: An AI agent for browser automation and web testing using Playwright, compliant with the Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol.

results.title: Agentic Data Analysis
results.description: An AI agent built in LangGraph that performs data analysis on a provided dataset, showcasing advanced LangGraph techniques.

results.title: app.build Agent
results.description: app.build Agent is an open-source AI agent that generates production-ready applications with testing, linting, and deployment setup from a single prompt.

results.title: ReAct Agent Framework
results.description: A Python framework for creating AI agents using the ReAct pattern (Reasoning + Acting), featuring a FastAPI-style API, decorator-based tools, and an interactive CLI for building intelligent applications.

results.title: Agentic Coding Boilerplate
results.description: A comprehensive boilerplate for building AI-powered applications and autonomous agents, featuring authentication, PostgreSQL, AI chat, and modern UI components with Next.js, React, and TypeScript.

results.title: AI SDK Agents
results.description: AI SDK Agents provides 85+ production-ready full-stack patterns for building AI-powered applications with workflows, tool calling, and agent orchestration using Vercel AI SDK v6 and shadcn/ui.

results.title: Agentica
results.description: Agentica is an AI function calling framework that simplifies AI agent development by allowing you to define agents using TypeScript classes, Swagger/OpenAPI documents, or MCP servers.

results.title: LiveKit Agent Starter for React
results.description: A starter template for LiveKit Agents providing a simple voice interface for real-time voice interaction, transcriptions, virtual avatars, and video/screen sharing capabilities using the LiveKit JavaScript SDK and Next.js.

results.title: Strands Agent Builder
results.description: Strands Agent Builder is an interactive toolkit for building, testing, and extending AI agents and tools with a model-driven approach, featuring a CLI and integrated tools.

results.title: Atlan AI Agent Toolkit
results.description: A collection of tools and protocols for interacting with Atlan services for AI agents, including a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for asset search and retrieval.

results.title: LangGraph ReAct Agent Template
results.description: A template showcasing a ReAct agent implemented with LangGraph, designed for LangGraph Studio, that iteratively reasons about user queries and executes actions using available tools.

results.title: Agentset
results.description: Agentset is a RAG-as-a-service platform for developers, providing a complete retrieval pipeline for building AI applications with features like data ingestion, semantic search, filtering, and reranking across various data types.
